text: Science has a clearer story about transcription factors than social media does. Transcription factors are proteins that bind to specific DNA sequences, turning genes on or off. Imagine them as the conductors of an orchestra, controlling the symphony of life at a molecular level. Research shows that dysregulation of these factors can lead to diseases like cancer. So next time you think about your health, remember these tiny but mighty proteins. Curious about more science secrets? Hit that follow button!
